status_policy: Statuses are documentation/artifact availability only; no live health checks are fabricated.

agents.name: Axone
agents.owns: Routing, coordination, architecture guard, final aggregation
agents.consumes: User/operator requests, agent outputs, architecture docs
agents.boundaries: Does not code, fetch APIs, train, backtest, approve risk, or trade

agents.name: Spider
agents.owns: Binance/web/HTTP fetches and raw external data retrieval
agents.emits: Raw data to Chronos, Karen, Darwin, Kerry as requested
agents.boundaries: No trade decisions; no bot/strategy/risk/live-store writes

agents.name: Chronos
agents.owns: Historical storage, replay, walk-forward validation, evidence ledgers
agents.emits: Evidence/metrics/ledgers to Sentinel, Wally, Tibot, Darwin, Guy
agents.boundaries: Never modifies live data; never trains bots; never creates strategies or approves trades

agents.name: Kerry
agents.owns: DATA/live rolling feature-ready datasets, max 200 candles
agents.emits: Live features to Tibot, Wally, Sentinel
agents.boundaries: No historical writes, no bot training, no strategy creation

agents.name: Tibot
agents.owns: Prediction and classification bots; training/optimisation; bot registry
agents.consumes: Chronos historical datasets and Kerry live features
agents.emits: Probabilities, classes, expected return, confidence, validation metrics
agents.boundaries: Does not create strategies, emit trades, execute, or write historical/live data

agents.name: Wally
agents.boundaries: No bot ownership/training; no execution; cannot bypass Sentinel; no risk-store writes

agents.name: Sentinel
agents.owns: Portfolio risk, gating, strategy ratings, paper/live execution path
agents.consumes: Wally proposals, Chronos evidence, Karen advisory context
agents.boundaries: No bots or strategies; cannot enable paper/live without explicit operator approval

agents.name: Darwin
agents.owns: Symbol proposals, bot-family proposals, strategy mutations, advisory assessments
agents.consumes: Owner-produced evidence from Chronos/Tibot/Wally/Sentinel plus Spider external data
agents.emits: Advisory recommendations into the controlled chain
agents.boundaries: Never deploys directly; never writes bot/strategy/risk/historical/live stores

agents.name: Karen
agents.boundaries: No approval, blocking, sizing, veto, or direct fetching

agents.name: Sublime
agents.owns: Scripts, pipelines, ML implementation, debugging and tests
agents.boundaries: Does not decide trading logic, strategy intent, or risk policy

agents.name: Conchita
agents.owns: System health, config, recovery, skills upkeep
agents.emits: Maintenance reports and approved config patches
agents.boundaries: No trading logic/bot/strategy/risk changes without explicit operator approval

agents.name: Glia
agents.boundaries: No trading logic/bot/strategy/risk changes; no silent drop of trading-relevant memory

agents.name: Guy
agents.owns: Static visualisation artifacts under Guy workspace
agents.consumes: Read-only architecture docs and approved dashboard/source artifacts
agents.boundaries: No upstream writes, no trading, no API calls, no scheduler changes

layers.name: External intelligence/data
layers.note: Spider fetches; Karen analyses copy/public-trader behaviour for Sentinel only.

layers.name: Data engines
layers.note: Chronos owns historical evidence; Kerry owns rolling live features.

layers.name: Model intelligence
layers.note: Tibot is sole owner of prediction/classification bots.

layers.name: Strategy
layers.note: Wally consumes Tibot outputs and emits proposals, never execution.

layers.name: Risk gate
layers.note: Sentinel is the only gate to paper/live execution and risk decisions.

layers.name: Research / evolution
layers.note: Darwin is advisory and never deploys directly.

layers.name: Build / maintain / remember / view
layers.note: Support agents stay inside their ownership boundaries.

approval_chains: New symbol: Darwin proposal → Chronos data availability → Kerry live-data feasibility → Tibot training feasibility → Wally strategy feasibility → Sentinel risk approval → Axone operator approval
New bot family: Darwin/Tibot proposal → Chronos validation evidence → Tibot training & registry → Wally consumes → Sentinel ratings
Strategy mutation: Darwin proposal → Wally evaluation → Sentinel rating & gate
Trade: Wally proposal → Sentinel gate → explicit operator approval for paper/live only
Risk-limit change: Sentinel proposal citing Chronos evidence → operator approval

tibot_subdashboard.method: copied static directory and embedded via relative iframe plus direct relative link
